pairs.question: What is CEE Property Development Portfolio B.V. (CPDP) and where is it registered?
pairs.answer: CEE Property Development Portfolio B.V. (CPDP) is a closed-end real estate investment fund registered in the Netherlands.

pairs.question: Which company managed the assets of CPDP since its launch in September 2004?
pairs.answer: The assets of CPDP have been managed by CEE Asset Management (CEE AM) since its launch in September 2004.

pairs.question: What significant ownership change occurred for CEE AM in April 2008?
pairs.answer: In April 2008, CEE Asset Management (CEE AM) was acquired by Jersey-based CEE ASSET MANAGEMENT LIMITED, previously owned by Sekyra Group.

pairs.question: Name two real estate assets purchased by CPDP after its incorporation.
pairs.answer: After its incorporation, CPDP purchased Roztyly Centrum, an administrative building leased by T-Mobile Czech Republic, and Gallery MYŠÁK, a real estate property in downtown Prague.

pairs.question: What was the purpose of the subsidiary CPDP Jungmannova founded in August 2006?
pairs.answer: The subsidiary CPDP Jungmannova was founded to acquire Mrázovka II from Sekyra Group, which owned the administrative building Golden Cross on Jungmann Square in Prague.

pairs.question: How did CPDP increase its stake in the Central Park Praha project to 99.9% in February 2009?
pairs.answer: In February 2009, CPDP subscribed to newly issued shares of company CPP Lux, thereby increasing its share in the Central Park Praha project to 99.9%.

pairs.question: What financial provision did Česká spořitelna recognize against its ownership interest in CPDP in December 2009?
pairs.answer: In December 2009, Česká spořitelna recognized a provision of CZK 1.8 billion against its ownership interest in CPDP.
